framework_role: LLM application risk and vulnerability guidance

execution_boundary.summary: OWASP risks inform execution controls but do not directly provide runtime verdicts.

preparation_boundary.summary: Prompt injection, tool misuse, and data leakage risks can appear during preparation.

commitment_boundary.summary: Risk guidance must be converted into policy/evidence checks before commit-time standing.

semantic_equivalence_boundary.summary: OWASP categories help identify equivalent risk paths across different labels or payloads.

unknown_trajectory_boundary.summary: Unknown LLM-app behaviors should escalate when they overlap known risk classes.

authority_boundary.summary: Risk guidance is not execution authority.

evidence_freshness_boundary.summary: Guidance version and application context must be preserved.

reconstruction_boundary.summary: OWASP mapping supports reconstructive risk explanation when attached to evidence.

interoperability_path.summary: OWASP maps to benchmark categories, mitigations, and application-security review.

next_required_action: add OWASP risk-category fixture mapped to runtime benchmark cases
